slides.headline: Unlock success in the first 90 days
slides.body: Start strong with our VASCO success plan.

slides.headline: Understand the VA framework
slides.body: Master the key policies and programs to ensure compliance.

slides.headline: Build key relationships
slides.body: Network with VA officials to get support and stay informed.
bullets: Establish regular communication with your SAA

slides.headline: Train staff on VA policies
slides.body: Ensure your team is up-to-date on VA rules.

slides.headline: Identify and solve issues early
slides.body: Recognize and address potential compliance issues promptly.

slides.headline: Achieve quick wins
slides.body: Implement strategies to improve your VASCO performance.
Learn more about our VASCO success plan. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Start strong with our VASCO success plan. Understand the VA framework, build key relationships, train staff, identify and solve issues early, and achieve quick wins. Learn more: https://aimilitaryservices.com/blog/first-90-days-vasco

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, 'Achieve quick wins,' which could benefit from a more concise takeaway or a visual element to draw attention.
